Tests that the sine of infinity is NaN using the Math.sin function.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.sin` function when given `Infinity` as an input. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.sin(Infinity)` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). This test ensures that the `Math.sin` function conforms to the expected mathematical behavior when handling infinite values. The script is narrow in functionality, focusing solely on this specific edge case for the sine function.
